## Specification Surface

Which platform surface does this define?

- [ ] ABI
- [ ] Runtime lifecycle
- [ ] Plugin model
- [ ] Action model
- [ ] Transport model
- [ ] Security model
- [ ] Compatibility model
- [ ] Generator / bindings
- [ ] Other

## Problem

Describe the architectural uncertainty or missing contract.

## Proposed Contract

Describe the expected normative behavior.

## Ownership

Which file or directory should become the source of truth?

## Validation

How should this be tested?

- [ ] Schema validation
- [ ] Conformance fixture
- [ ] Compatibility report
- [ ] Runtime behavior test

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] Contract is documented
- [ ] Schema or fixture exists when applicable
- [ ] Compatibility impact is known
- [ ] Implementation can consume this without redefining it
